name: integration_niche_gpt_wrapper__religious_content__
method: niche gpt wrapper + religious content + subscription tiers app_monetization

phases.name: audit_existing
steps: scan all deployed religious apps for current feature set
check which already have Stripe product IDs
identify top 5 by traffic for priority upgrade

phases.name: build_ai_layer
steps: create shared ai-wrapper.js module (Claude API proxy via serverless function or client-side prompt)
build denomination-specific prompt templates (scripture context, prayer style, theological framework)
create subscription gate UI component (lock AI features behind paywall)

phases.name: wire_payments
steps: create Stripe products + prices for each app (free/basic/premium)
inject upgrade CTA into each app landing page

phases.name: deploy_and_distribute
steps: batch deploy upgraded apps to surge.sh
generate 3 tweets + 1 thread about AI-powered religious apps
submit to religious app directories and communities
